skill.name: x-create
skill.description: Create X (Twitter) posts, threads, and replies from a user profile, selected post style, and reusable post patterns.
skill.summary: Create X posts, threads, and replies using persona settings and proven social post patterns.
skill.author: kangarooking

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported many external command, weak cryptography, and high entropy indicators, but review found Markdown examples and Chinese-language content rather than executable code or obfuscation. The only confirmed security concern is low-risk local filesystem use for reading and updating a user profile file.

low_findings.title: Local Profile File Access
low_findings.description: The skill instructs the agent to read references/user-profile.md and update it after onboarding. This is a legitimate personalization feature, but it stores user persona details in local files and should avoid secrets.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The read and update instructions are explicit, and the referenced profile file contains configurable account and scoring fields. Risk is low because no network transmission or secret collection is present.

low_findings.title: External Command Findings Dismissed
low_findings.description: The reported Ruby or shell backtick matches are Markdown inline code, fenced examples, file paths, and command-style slash prompts. No executable script, shell invocation, or user-controlled command execution was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All cited locations are Markdown documentation or examples. There is no code file, process launch API, shell command construction, or execution path.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Findings Dismissed
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography detections at SKILL.md lines 3 and 66 do not correspond to cryptographic APIs, algorithms, hashes, ciphers, or authentication logic. They are descriptive text about X content creation and reply format selection.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed lines contain only front matter and workflow prose. No cryptographic operation is present, so the static match is a false positive.

low_findings.title: High Entropy Findings Dismissed
low_findings.description: The high entropy alerts are caused by dense Chinese-language Markdown examples and templates. No encoded payload, binary content, encrypted block, or obfuscated instruction was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both files are human-readable Markdown with social post templates. The content is structured prose, not compressed, encrypted, or executable data.

content.value_statement: Writing consistent X content is hard when persona, format, and tone change across posts. This skill turns profile settings and post patterns into short posts, threads, and replies.
actual_capabilities: Creates short X posts, multi-post threads, and reply drafts.
Uses a local user profile to match audience, domain, language, and persona.
Supports five post styles: high-value, sharp opinion, trending comment, story insight, and tech analysis.
Uses user-provided reference posts when templates are available.
Provides publishing suggestions such as timing, image ideas, and engagement expectations.
Onboards first-time users by collecting profile preferences.
limitations: It does not publish posts directly to X.
It relies on the user to verify facts, news, and performance claims.
It may imitate style patterns, but it cannot guarantee engagement results.
It stores profile preferences locally and should not receive secrets.

use_cases.title: Build a Founder Voice
use_cases.description: Turn product lessons, market opinions, and launch updates into consistent X posts.

use_cases.title: Draft Technical Threads
use_cases.description: Explain tools, models, and engineering ideas through structured threads for technical readers.

use_cases.title: React to Trends Quickly
use_cases.description: Create timely comments and replies that match a saved account persona and audience.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Short Post
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for one X post
prompt_templates.prompt: Use x-create to write one short X post about [topic]. Use my saved profile and choose the best post style.

prompt_templates.title: Write a Thread
prompt_templates.prompt: Use x-create to create a 5-post thread about [topic]. Make it useful, direct, and aligned with my persona.

prompt_templates.title: Draft a Reply
prompt_templates.prompt: Use x-create to draft a reply to this post: [paste post]. Add a distinct perspective without sounding aggressive.

prompt_templates.title: Apply a Specific Pattern
prompt_templates.prompt: Use x-create for [topic] with the tech-analysis pattern. Compare it with my reference templates before drafting.

output_examples.input: Create a short post about using AI tools for daily research.
output_examples.output: A concise Chinese X post with a hook, three practical steps, and a short closing line that invites saves.

output_examples.input: Write a thread about why MCP matters for developers.
output_examples.output: A five-part thread that defines MCP, explains the old workflow problem, describes the standard, and ends with a clear opinion.

output_examples.input: Reply to a trending post about a new AI model release.
output_examples.output: A brief reply that adds context, names one practical implication, and leaves room for discussion.

best_practices: Complete the profile before asking for production-ready posts.
Provide reference posts when you want a specific voice or structure.
Review factual claims before publishing time-sensitive content.
anti_patterns: Do not use it to copy another creator word for word.
Do not store private credentials or sensitive personal data in the profile file.
Do not publish generated claims without checking the source material.

faq.question: Does this skill publish directly to X?
faq.answer: No. It creates drafts and may suggest using a separate publishing workflow.

faq.question: Can it write both English and Chinese posts?
faq.answer: Yes. The included profile uses zh-CN by default, but the language can be adjusted.

faq.question: What post types does it support?
faq.answer: It supports short posts, threads, and replies across five content styles.

faq.question: Can I add my own examples?
faq.answer: Yes. Add reference posts under the templates folders for the style you want.

faq.question: Is it safe to include private data?
faq.answer: No. Use persona preferences only, and avoid secrets or sensitive personal details.

faq.question: Will it guarantee viral performance?
faq.answer: No. It uses proven patterns, but reach depends on timing, audience, and topic quality.
